context: Evaluates implementation of the affordabot legislation list and detail REST endpoints. Focuses on correct use of the SCRAPERS registry for validation, PostgresDB query methods, response shape assembly, and total_impact_p50 calculation.

checklist.name: Jurisdiction validation
checklist.description: Both GET /legislation/{jurisdiction} and GET /legislation/{jurisdiction}/{bill_number} return HTTP 404 when the jurisdiction is not present in the SCRAPERS dict.

checklist.name: List endpoint response shape
checklist.description: GET /legislation/{jurisdiction} returns a dict with jurisdiction, count, and legislation keys; each item includes bill_number, title, status, impacts, sufficiency_state, analysis_timestamp.

checklist.name: total_impact_p50 calculation
checklist.description: total_impact_p50 sums impact.p50 for impacts where p50 is not None; returns null when no quantified impacts exist.

checklist.name: Detail endpoint and 404
checklist.description: GET /legislation/{jurisdiction}/{bill_number} calls db.get_bill() and returns the result, or raises HTTP 404 when get_bill() returns None.

checklist.name: confidence_score rename
checklist.description: The confidence_score field in impacts is renamed to confidence in the response (matching the frontend contract).
